results.title: Ohio Ice Cream Trail expands to 195 stops, including eight in Carroll and Harrison counties
results.description: TourismOhio's 2026 Ohio Ice Cream Trail features a record 195 stops statewide, with eight locations in Carroll and Harrison counties. Find the local ice cream shops on the trail and where to access the interactive map and printable guide.

results.title: A Slump In Big Ships Pulled The Baltic Dry Index Lower
results.description: Capesize rates cooled, knocking the index down 1.7%, while smaller supramax vessels hit their highest level since August 2022.

results.title: Swimmers call for more water time as Peterborough indoor pool faces £3.8 million revamp
results.description: Keen swimmers have called for more time in the water as Peterborough’s only indoor public pool is set to undergo a £3.8 million revamp.

results.title: Rays slugger Junior Caminero feels fortunate left hand not broken after he was hit in All-Star Game
results.description: Tampa Bay Rays third baseman Junior Caminero left the All-Star Game after being hit by a pitch on his left hand.

results.title: Decision due on proposal to remove planning condition on Omega West site
results.description: Councillors are set to make a decision on proposals to remove a planning condition relating to a site at Omega West.

results.title: Emaciated ponies and horse euthanised after severe neglect by owner
results.description: A woman from Peebles has been sentenced after starving two of her ponies and a horse so severely that vets had no option but to put all three animals to sleep.

results.title: Indian Grey Hornbill returns to Gir after six decades, records four years of successful breeding, study finds
results.description: Indian Grey Hornbills have bred successfully in Gujarat's Gir forests for four consecutive years after reintroduction, marking a significant milestone in species restoration efforts.

results.title: From Technology To Fashion: Anuradha Viswanathan's Change Of Career
results.description: Anuradha Viswanathan transitioned from a career in engineering and technology to modelling and acting after entering beauty pageants. Based in the UAE, she has walked at major fashion events in India and abroad, worked with leading designers, made her acting debut in Parchaayi, and continues to build a career across fashion and entertainment.

results.title: Brazilian World Cup legend Jairzinho takes a shot: Michael Donald’s best photograph
results.description: ‘Nowadays Jairzinho works with kids in the favelas of Rio where the unwritten rule is that you have to be out by 5pm. I asked for 10 more minutes and when I turned round, a guy had pulled a gun on my crew’ I’m not a mad football fan. What I most love about the game is its universal appeal – it’s all about a ball crossing a line, and a goal is a goal whether it involves two jerseys in a park or the one that determines the outcome of a World Cup. But when I realised in 2007 that only 58 people had ever scored a goal in a World Cup final and that only 34 of these men were still alive, I thought it would be a great idea to photograph them. It quickly became apparent that book sales alone would never finance the project – there were only two English players, the rest were in Europe or South America. But a successful pitch to a film producer won me the opportunity to travel to 13 countries with a documentary crew. Over the course of four years, we interviewed every member of the exclusive World Cup club, and I made portraits of them all. Continue reading...
